name: Los Angeles
description: Greater Los Angeles, 2049. The climate collapse is old news. Rain when it comes is acid; the sky has forgotten blue; the sun is a rumour above the permanent overcast. A few variations on a theme of bad.

any.label: HEAVY SMOG. visibility 200m. particulate warning in effect. breathe shallow.
LIGHT ACID RAIN. ph 4.2. unprotected skin inadvisable. neon on every surface.
HEAVY ACID RAIN. ph 3.6. streets running coloured under the holograms. stay in, stay covered.
FLAT OVERCAST. no rain, no wind. the sky a single grey panel from horizon to horizon.
TOXIC FOG ROLLED IN OFF THE PACIFIC. visibility sub-50m. respirator recommended.
DRY DUST EVENT. wind off the eastern deserts. grit in everything. amber light.
COLD RAIN, NON-ACID. unusual. almost clean. people on the street look up.
WEAK SUN BREAKING THROUGH. a thin bright disc. visible shadows for the first time in weeks.
ELECTRICAL STORM. lightning walking between the spires. advertising boards stuttering. power warnings city-wide.
